# `library_codex.convolution.ArithmeticConvolution`

約数/倍数zeta--Möbius・GCD/LCM畳み込み。

- 計算量の目安: $O(N\log\log N)$
- source: [`convolution/ArithmeticConvolution.py`](../../../convolution/ArithmeticConvolution.py)
- 公開API: function 6、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.convolution.ArithmeticConvolution import (
    divisor_zeta_transform,
    divisor_mobius_transform,
    multiple_zeta_transform,
    multiple_mobius_transform,
    gcd_convolution,
    lcm_convolution,
)
```
